name: Dog Fest Rabbit Ears With Lamb 55G
description: Let your dog get busy with this mouth-watering treat. Made of chewy rabbit ears and filled with real chicken meat. This treat could become your dog's favorite. Composition: lamb, rabbit ear, vegetable by-products, minerals. Analytical constituents, %: crude protein 38, crude fat 5, crude fiber 0.2, crude ash 5, moisture 18.
